<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：神經膠母細胞瘤（與放射治療同步及輔助治療）</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（2 個）：<ul>
<li>adult astrocytic tumour（99.4%）</li>
<li>cauda equina neoplasm（99.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
